refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump operations to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies specific operational phases impacting cycle time, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying it meets or is below CT_target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive load operation control algorithm
DP2: Efficient travel path planning and speed control
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to address each sub-FR respectively

potential_sources: Interdependency between travel and load timing
Coordination between dump sequencing and travel completion
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by operation phase but require interface coordination to ensure cycle time optimization.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data for operation timing
Risk of suboptimal coordination causing cycle time delays
High safety criticality requires fail-safe operation of control algorithms
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage inter-phase timing dependencies.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and optimization of load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange of sensor data and operation status for cycle time monitoring and control feedback

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Commands to Vehicle module to execute load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receive safety alerts from Safety Services to adjust operation timing if needed

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralized coordination logic aligns well with NGHE Solution module ownership.
Vehicle executes commands but does not coordinate cycle time optimization.
Teleoperation supports remote control but is not primary for cycle time optimization.
Safety Services provide alerts but do not implement cycle time logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Cycle time optimization logic is best contained within the NGHE Solution module to minimize diffusion and maintain clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple operation phases
Risk of interface overload with Vehicle and Safety Services modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor interface complexity and consider modularizing cycle time logic internally if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition into load, travel, and dump is clear and maps logically to selected DPs addressing each sub-FR.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Interface load on Telemetry and Tasking links
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution for ownership; diffusion risks are manageable with clear interface definitions.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible at NGHE Solution module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces to Vehicle and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit coordination interface or sub-module within NGHE Solution for inter-phase timing
Review interface bandwidth and latency requirements for Telemetry and Tasking

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment satisfy the requirements with manageable risks and clear ownership.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sensor data is accurate and timely
Interfaces support required data rates and latency
Safety alerts can be integrated without disrupting cycle time optimization
open_risks: Complexity of coordination logic within NGHE Solution
Potential interface overload or latency impacting cycle time
evidence_needed: Telemetry data demonstrating cycle time under target
